title: Karnataka SSLC exam-1 results: Chikkamagaluru topper followed a goal-oriented study plan for 7 hours everyday
content: Brunda M. Tapse wishes to study science at PUC and pursue her higher studies in the engineering stream.

title: Tamil Nadu elections 2026 LIVE: State's voter turnout touches 70% by 3 p.m.; policeman stabbed inside polling booth
content: Limited bus services affect polling day travel; robots dressed in 'dhavanis' (half-sarees) welcome and assist voters in several booths across the State; several young voters show up in colour-coded outfits, purportedly in support of TVK

title: India’s butterfly boom: How Nature walks, parks, and trails are sparking a new conservation movement
content: From Bengaluru’s urban forests to the Northeast’s biodiversity hotspots, enthusiasts and experts are turning butterfly-watching into a powerful gateway to ecology, education, and sustainable travel

title: Sixteen workers injured in major fire at chemical factory in Gujarat's Bharuch
content: “Emergency response teams and local police personnel rushed to the site after being alerted about the incident. Fire tenders and ambulances are also stationed at the spot,” an official said

title: Delhi court sends man accused of killing IRS officer’s daughter to 4-day police custody
content: With his face covered by a cloth, the accused was produced in the jam-packed courtroom where the magistrate asked Rahul Meena about the injuries shown in the medico-legal report to which the accused said he got hurt while getting down from the terrace

title: West Bengal Elections 2026 LIVE: State registers 78.77% voting as of 3 p.m. amid sporadic incidents of violence
content: A clash broke out in Murshidabad as TMC workers got into an altercation with the police as AUJP leader Humayun Kabir arrived

title: Karnataka SSLC exam-1 results: State records ‘historic’ 94.1% pass percentage
content: The results have shown a marked improvement, with a 14.06 percentage point increase compared to the 80.04% recorded last year

title: Karnataka SSLC exam-1 results: State toppers reflect on their journey to 625/625
content: Karnataka Class 10 toppers tell The Hindu how they achieved the perfect score and the intense preparation that helped them shine

title: India-Africa ties signal “stability in a turbulent world”: Jaishankar
content: At IAFS-IV launch, EAM highlights India-Africa partnership, development cooperation, and strategic engagement

title: Delhi woman rape and murder case: Rajasthan police probing rape charge against accused man
content: The culprit is a serial offender, and has been accussed of sexually assaulting a woman in Rajasthan’s Alwar haours before committing the crime in Delhi

title: In Photos: Tamil Nadu votes
content: The election in Tamil Nadu started with long queues of people waiting outside the polling stations to exercise their franchise

title: Policeman stabbed at polling booth in Poompuhar constituency; ex-serviceman arrested
content: Preliminary inquiry revealed that the suspect allegedly harboured hostility towards police personnel and had been involved in a similar assault on a policeman a few years ago

title: Karnataka SSLC exam-1 results: Some play, some study is the secret to Begaluru topper’s perfect score
content: Initially, Dhanush studied only a little, choosing to play sports like chess, cricket, and tennis alongside. He took a more disciplines approach as the exams neared.

title: Tamil Nadu elections 2026 | Rajinikanth, Kamal Haasan, Ajith Kumar and others cast their votes
content: Other stars from Tamil Nadu’s film fraternity, like Vikram, Sivakarthikeyan and Sasikumar, were also seen voting at their respective polling booths in the state

title: Karnataka SSLC exam-1 results: A top-scoring student from Raichur continues his success streak in Class 10
content: Sukhadeva told The Hindu that he only studied four to five hours a day. Though he initially took tuitions for a month, he later began studying at home by himself.

title: Bengal polls: BJP MLA Agnimitra Paul's car attacked in Asansol, rear windowpanes shattered
content: Stones were thrown at my moving car as I was exiting a polling booth premises. The rear window was shattered. It is very clear who is behind this. This is an attempt to influence the election, says BJP candidate Agnimitra Paul

title: Karnataka SSLC exam-1 results: Teachers, parents encouraged me to achieve centum, says Udupi topper
content: A student of Mother Theresa Memorial School in Shankaranarayana of Kundapura Taluk, Preetham is the eldest of the two children of Ganapathy Poojary, a private bus conductor, and Nagaratna, a home maker.

title: Karnataka SSLC exam-1 results: Vijayapura topper aspires to be a scientist
content: Saujanya, whose parents are both teachers, said her studying techniques focussed on understanding and not rote learning.

title: Karnataka SSLC exam-1 results: Son of farm labourer with tiny landholding is Davangere topper
content: Bharath is a student of Vidyalakshmi English Medium School in Channagiri taluk would commute to school everyday from his native village.

title: Kurnool Collector, SP lead Nasha Mukt Bharat walkathon; students warned against drug use
content: District Collector A. Siri and Superintendent of Police Vikrant Patil took part in the awareness march from Raj Vihar to the Collector’s Office, organised by EAGLE, the State’s anti-narcotics force

title: Kerala’s Thrissur Pooram to go fireworks-free this year after blast; famed ‘Kudamattam’ to be scaled down
content: Decision taken at high-level meeting in Thrissur. Key rituals to continue with reduced spectacle as authorities prioritise safety

title: BJP to contest four seats in upcoming Maharashtra Legislative Council polls
content: Nine council members, including former CM Uddhav Thackeray and Legislative Council Deputy Chairperson Neelam Gorhe, are retiring on May 13.

title: Respect all views except Whatsapp University: Supreme Court in Sabarimala case
content: The observation by a nine-judge Constitution bench came while hearing petitions related to discrimination against women at religious places, including the Sabarimala Temple in Kerala

title: Ladakh L-G Saxena approves major tourism reforms to ease business, cut compliance burden
content: As part of the reforms, several documentation requirements have been removed, easing entry barriers and improving transparency

title: Africa occupies central place in India’s foreign policy today: Jaishankar
content: The India-Africa relationship is rooted in “our civilisational linkages”, nurtured over centuries through cultural exchanges and human interactions, the External Affairs Minister said

title: Telangana’s maximum temperatures again surge to near 45°C
content: Thunderstorms accompanied by lightning and gusty winds forecast in 17 Telangana districts on Thursday

title: Police strengthen security at bus stands as Telangana RTC set to recruit temporary crew
content: Khammam Police Commissioner directed the officials to take immediate action, as per law, against those who cause damage to the public transport system (buses) and government properties

title: Tamil Nadu elections: Robots greet voters at polling booths in Vellore
content: Election officials said that out of the total 1,427 polling booths in Vellore district, two polling booths were chosen to deploy robots to assist voters

title: Kerala heatwave alert: Palakkad sizzles as IMD warns of extreme heat conditions
content: IMD bulletin says maximum temperatures are ‘very likely’ to be around 41°C in isolated places in Palakkad; 40°C in Kollam and Thrissur; 38°C in Kottayam, Pathanamthitta, Ernakulam, and Kozhikode; 37°C in Alappuzha, Malappuram, Kannur, and Kasaragod; and 36°C in Thiruvananthapuram district till April 24

title: Tamil Nadu elections: Central region of State sees brisk, peaceful polling till noon
content: In Tiruchi East, where actor and TVK founder C. Joseph Vijay is contesting, the polling percentage was 17.72% in the first two hours

title: George Kutty, a beloved figure in Bengaluru’s film society movement, no more
content: As the driving force behind the Bangalore Film Society and the editor of Deep Focus magazine, George Kutty brought thought-provoking and socially relevant films to the forefront

title: West Bengal election 2026: Clashes break out between AJUP, TMC workers in Murshidabad
content: The violence was reported from Shibnagar village in the Naoda Assembly constituency during the first phase of the State Assembly polls.

title: Demand to augment comfortable public transport buses along NH 66 to reduce dependance on private vehicles
content: Four/six-laning of NH 66 nears completion as demand grows to augment bus connectivity; experts call for more KSRTC buses, private participation, and a public transport policy to lessen reliance on private vehicles

title: TMC accuses police of acting in BJP's favour in Nandigram, Suvendu alleges voter intimidation
content: The presence of these officers is raising serious concerns about the neutrality in the polling process, says State Minister Shashi Panja

title: ‘Ramlal’ joins poll queue: Elephant’s early morning visit adds twist to Bengal polls
content: Polling officials were still settling in, voters were trickling towards the booth, and then came 'Ramlal' — swaying past the queue, peering curiously at a parked vehicle, and momentarily holding up the democratic exercise with its own brand of silent assertion

title: Ranya Rao walks out of prison in gold smuggling case as COFEPOSA detention ends
content: Officials said the Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, which had booked the case, will not challenge the lapse of Ranya Rao’s detention and is not seeking an extension

title: Sri Venkateswara Museum revamp at Tirumala nearing completion; to be inaugurated in September
content: Built at a cost of ₹145 crore the redeveloped museum will house 14 interactive galleries across 1.20 lakh sq. ft.; the inner galleries are complete and the outer galleries will be finished soon

title: ‘Pallichattambi’ movie review: Tovino Thomas’ ahistorical period drama undone by heavy-handed approach
content: The Dijo Jose Antony directorial, set amid the tumultuous period of the Liberation Struggle in Kerala, takes a very dated approach in writing and filmmaking

title: IRS officer’s daughter raped and murdered in southeast Delhi home
content: According to police, the victim was discovered by her family members inside the house under suspicious circumstances, following which the police were alerted.

title: Trust trumps everything else: Anthropic’s India chief Irina Ghose
content: At the AWS Summit in Bengaluru, Irina Ghose, Managing Director of India at Anthropic, highlighted the importance of customers’ trust and reliable products that serve all users

title: West Bengal polls 2026: Kapil Sibal questions purpose of election; slams EC
content: The Rajya Sabha MP also took a swipe at Chief Election Commissioner Gyanesh Kumar, saying he must be awarded with a Padma Bhushan

title: CPI seeks ₹500 crore to rebuild Peddavagu project breached in 2024 floods
content: State secretary G. Eswaraiah has written to the Andhra Pradesh and Telangana Chief Ministers, saying the 1977-built project, which irrigates 23,000 acres and supplies water to about 30 villages, remains largely unusable almost two years after the breach

title: Vengaivayal, where water tank was contaminated with human faeces in 2022, boycotts polls
content: The boycott stems from the alleged contamination of an overhead tank supplying drinking water to the SC hamlet with human faeces — an incident that triggered widespread outrage and is currently under investigation by the CB-CID

title: Tamil Nadu elections: Delays, limited bus services affect polling day travel across State
content: Commuters across Tamil Nadu faced delays and crowding on polling day as limited public transport services disrupted travel to native places

title: Jagan visits bereaved families of YSRCP leaders on second day of Pulivendula tour
content: The former Chief Minister called on the families of Sudhakar Reddy and Pulla Reddy, offered prayers at the Shiva temple in Ippatla, and held a Praja Darbar at the party office

title: 8-year-old boy dies after snakebite in Kerala’s Thiruvananthapuram; cobra captured
content: The incident at Chirayinkeezhu has evoked the grim memory of another child, Aljo Siljo, who died after being bitten by a snake while sleeping in Thrissur recently

title: Maharashtra bypolls: Baramati sees 20.5% turnout, Rahuri 18.2% till 11 a.m.
content: The Rahuri seat became vacant after BJP MLA Shivaji Kardile’s death in October last year. His son Akshay Kardile is in the fray in Rahuri, pitted against NCP (SP) candidate Govind Mokate and Vanchit Bahujan Aghadi’s Santosh Chalke.

title: Fireworks unit licensee booked for storing excess explosives ahead of Kerala’s Thrissur Pooram
content: Search was initiated at Muthalamada in Palakkad following the fireworks blast at a unit in Thrissur that killed 15

title: 3 players who could replace Ayush Mhatre at no.3 for CSK against MI
content: Chennai Super Kings face a significant blow as top-order batsman Ayush Mhatre is out with a hamstring tear. His absence at number three creates a void ahead of their clash with Mumbai Indians. The team is now considering options like Urvil Patel, Sarfaraz Khan, or Kartik Sharma to fill the crucial batting position.

title: What Anthropic, OpenAI & other US tech cos are spending millions on in Washington
content: Tech giants like Google, Meta, and Amazon are significantly boosting lobbying efforts, spending millions as Artificial Intelligence becomes a major policy focus. Newcomers Anthropic and OpenAI are also dramatically increasing their Washington presence. Discussions with lawmakers cover AI regulation, national security, and infrastructure needs, highlighting intense competition in shaping future tech policies.

title: After $6.25 bn 'gift' to 'Trump Accounts', Michael & Susan Dell donate $750 m
content: Michael and Susan Dell have pledged $750 million to the University of Texas at Austin for a new medical center and research campus. This significant donation will focus on integrating AI and advanced computing to improve patient care, research, and education. The project, expected to open by 2030, aims to enhance Austin's healthcare capabilities and advance medical innovation.

title: 'If didi had given money ...': Man who raped, killed IRS officer's daughter shows no remorse
content: A former domestic help, Rahul Meena, allegedly used a spare key to enter a south Delhi apartment and rape and murder his former employer's daughter. He is suspected of strangling her, attempting to access a locker, and fleeing after stealing cash and jewelry. Meena, described as remorseful, is also being investigated for a similar crime in Rajasthan.

title: Dhoni plays with 'Champak', return buzz grows ahead of CSK vs MI clash
content: MS Dhoni, recovering from a calf strain, was seen practicing and playfully interacting with a robot dog at the Wankhede Stadium. His return to the field for Chennai Super Kings' clash against Mumbai Indians is highly anticipated, with former cricketer Ravichandran Ashwin confident in his fitness and ability to bolster CSK's finishing power.

title: Bhooth Bangla BO: Akshay Kumar starrer marches towards Rs 100 crore in week 1
content: 'Bhooth Bangla', directed by Priyadarshan and starring Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh Rawal, Wamiqa Gabbi, Rajpal Yadav, Mithila Palkar and Asrani, is closing in on the Rs. 100 crore India net milestone as it completes its first week in theatres. With a cumulative India net of Rs. 79.02 crore and a worldwide gross of Rs. 127.37 crore after seven days, the U/A certified horror-comedy has delivered a strong opening week despite competing against 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' in its fifth week and a full IPL 2026 season. Marking Akshay Kumar and Priyadarshan's reunion after 16 years, the 145-minute supernatural thriller follows Arjun Acharya confronting the demonic entity Vadhusur in his ancestral home in Mangalpur, featuring a nostalgic ensemble of Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav and the late Asrani.

title: 'We are installing tracking software in your machines': Meta to US employees
content: Meta is installing new tracking software on US employees' computers to capture mouse movements, clicks, and keystrokes for AI training. This initiative aims to improve AI agents' ability to perform work tasks autonomously, like using shortcuts. Meta assures employees the data won't be used for performance reviews, only for enhancing AI models.

title: 'Let the notice come, we'll reply': Kharge reacts to EC ultimatum over 'terrorist' remark
content: Congress chief Mallikarjun Kharge has responded to an Election Commission notice regarding his "terrorist" remarks on Prime Minister Narendra Modi. Kharge stated his party would reply to the EC's ultimatum, which warned of action if he failed to explain his stand within 24 hours. The controversial comment was made during campaigning in Chennai.

title: Voodoo outrage: Akola self-styled 'godman' lifts kids with his teeth in unsafe rituals
content: Disturbing videos show a self-styled godman in Akola district subjecting children to unsafe, superstition-driven rituals. Chetan Sunil Mule, known as 'Gulal Shesh Maharaj', has been holding such gatherings for years, claiming to cure illnesses. Authorities have summoned all self-styled godmen in the area following widespread outrage and demands for action.

title: After raping IRS officer's daughter, accused stole Rs 2.5 lakh: New details in south Delhi murder
content: A 22-year-old woman, daughter of an IRS officer, was allegedly raped and murdered in her south Delhi home. Police arrested a former domestic worker, Rahul Meena, who is also suspected of theft and a similar crime in Rajasthan. Meena was dismissed from his job due to repeated complaints about borrowing money.

title: A future without cigarettes: Britain’s long game against smoking
content: The UK Parliament has passed a landmark bill to create the first smoke-free generation by prohibiting cigarette sales to anyone born after December 31, 2008. This legislation, awaiting royal assent, also grants the government enhanced powers to regulate tobacco and vaping products, aiming to significantly reduce smoking-related deaths and protect future generations from addiction.

title: Man assaults woman outside liquor shop in Gurgaon; viral video sparks outrage
content: A heated argument outside a Gurugram liquor shop escalated into a physical altercation. A viral video shows a man slapping a woman multiple times after she allegedly hurled abuses. The woman retaliated, slapping him and pulling his T-shirt. Bystanders attempted to intervene. Police have taken note of the video but no formal complaint has been filed yet.

title: 2 rapes, 1 murder: Crime trail began in Alwar, ended in Delhi with IRS officer’s daughter’s killing
content: A 23-year-old man, accused of raping and killing an IIT graduate in Delhi, allegedly committed another violent sexual assault in Rajasthan hours prior. He arrived in Delhi by ambulance, then targeted his former employer's home, gaining entry through familiar security measures. Police are investigating both incidents jointly.

title: Why did Trump 'fire' US navy secretary abruptly amid Hormuz blockade? What reports claim
content: Navy Secretary John Phelan has been dismissed following reported tensions with Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and Deputy Defense Secretary Steve Feinberg. Disagreements over the pace of naval modernization and shipbuilding priorities, as well as Phelan's direct communication with President Trump, led to his removal. Hung Cao has been appointed acting Navy secretary.

title: India a ‘tough nut to crack’: US Trade Representative makes big statement as 3-day trade deal talks conclude
content: Under the proposed interim trade deal, the US has lowered tariffs on India from 50% to 18%. In August last year, Trump had imposed a 25% reciprocal tariff on India and an additional 25% penal tariff for India’s crude oil purchases from Russia.

title: Mitchell Starc set to join Delhi Capitals; selection headache on the cards
content: Mitchell Starc is set to join Delhi Capitals for IPL 2026 on Friday after Cricket Australia clearances, targeting a May 1 return against Rajasthan Royals. The injured fast bowler's arrival presents a selection dilemma for the Axar Patel-led side, which needs strong performances in upcoming matches to boost playoff hopes. Starc's gradual return will be managed carefully.

title: 'Shut up Trump': Iran mocks US president with AI-video over ceasefire extension on 'Pakistan's request'
content: Iran's consulate in Hyderabad shared an AI-generated video mocking US President Donald Trump's announcement of a ceasefire extension with Iran. The clip humorously depicts a fictional Trump agreeing to the extension at Pakistan's request, following Iran's accusations of US "disregard and lack of good faith" amid the ongoing peace negotiations.

title: Zelenskyy calls on 'big players' Trump, PM Modi and Xi to put pressure on Russia
content: Ukrainian President Zelenskyy urged global leaders, including PM Modi, to pressure Putin to end the war, stating mediation alone is insufficient. He emphasized unified international action over compromise.  Meanwhile, Ukraine is bolstering defence ties in the Middle East, signing drone cooperation agreements with Saudi Arabia, Qatar, and the UAE.

title: US intercepts 3 Iranian oil tankers near India, Malaysia amid maritime blockade
content: US forces have intercepted at least three Iranian oil tankers in Asian waters, redirecting them away from key shipping lanes near India, Malaysia, and Sri Lanka. This action intensifies Washington's maritime blockade on Iran, disrupting global energy flows. The US Central Command has directed numerous vessels to turn back, highlighting the growing impact on international trade amidst stalled diplomatic efforts.

title: Women entry in Sabarimala: SC says it won’t rely on ‘WhatsApp University’
content: The Supreme Court, while hearing a case on gender discrimination in temples, cautioned against relying on information from 'WhatsApp University.' A nine-judge bench, led by the Chief Justice, emphasized that while eminent authors' views are respected, personal opinions are not sufficient for judicial decisions. The court acknowledged the difficulty in defining essential religious practices.

title: 'Thunderous jolt': PM Modi hits back at TMC’s 'jhalmuri' dig with 'chillies' barb
content: Prime Minister Modi playfully responded to opposition criticism about his unscheduled jhalmuri stop in West Bengal, stating the state will celebrate BJP's victory with sweets and the popular snack.  He suggested the TMC felt the "heat of chillies" from his brief break, while the TMC accused him of staging a "scripted drama" and humiliating an Adivasi leader.

title: India’s crude oil production falls for 11th consecutive year; gas also sees a dip
content: According to data from the Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas, crude production fell 2.5 per cent to 28 million metric tonnes in 2025–26. This marks a cumulative drop of 22 per cent since 2014–15.

title: Watch: Video shows how Iran navy forces seized ships in Hormuz amid US standoff
content: Iran released footage showing its forces seizing two commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz, with the IRGC claiming the vessels were diverted to Iranian waters over alleged security violations. Meanwhile, Panama condemned the seizure of the MSC Francesca as “illegal,” warning it poses a serious threat to maritime security. Tehran said the IRGC captured the MSC Francesca and EPAMINODES in the Strait of Hormuz, alleging navigational interference and unauthorised movement.

title: How Rebel Wilson lost 36 kgs without extreme dieting - Ozempic or lifestyle?
content: Rebel Wilson's sustained conversation around her health journey in 2026 highlights a balanced approach to weight loss, emphasising gradual lifestyle changes over strict dieting. While she confirmed trying Ozempic for cravings, her major transformation stemmed from consistent walking, strength training, and mindful eating, reflecting a shift towards health first and self-acceptance.

title: 'Raped another woman day before': Killer knew IRS officer's routine, timed entry to assault daughter
content: A 23-year-old man, accused of a brutal rape and murder in Delhi, allegedly committed another heinous crime in Alwar, Rajasthan, hours prior. He forced his way into a woman's home, raped and attempted to strangle her before fleeing. Police apprehended him in a Delhi hotel after a multi-state manhunt.

title: Boston Marathon: Runner gives up personal best to save collapsing competitor
content: Sportsmanship shone at the Boston Marathon 2026 when two runners, Aaron Beggs and Robson de Oliveira, stopped to help a struggling first-time participant, Ajay Haridasse, just meters from the finish line. Despite sacrificing personal bests, they supported him across the line. All three later met qualifying standards for the next marathon.

title: IPL 2026: RR bowler fined for send-off gesture to Rishabh Pant
content: Rajasthan Royals pacer Nandre Burger has been fined 10% of his match fees and received one demerit point for a send-off gesture towards Rishabh Pant. This disciplinary action occurred during RR's dominant 40-run victory over LSG, where their bowling attack restricted the opposition to 119.

title: 1 lakh fake ENO, 50k coffee sachets seized: FSSAI shares 2 simple purity tests
content: Authorities have busted two illegal manufacturing units in Delhi, seizing over 1.5 lakh counterfeit sachets of popular brands like ENO and Nescafé. This crackdown highlights the growing problem of fake and adulterated food products in India, which poses a significant risk to consumers. The report also offers simple methods to detect common coffee adulterants like clay and chicory powder.

title: Denmark rail accident: Two trains collide head-on near Copenhagen, several injured
content: A severe head-on collision between two local trains in Denmark on Thursday has left several passengers injured. The incident, occurring near Copenhagen, prompted a large-scale emergency response. Authorities confirmed all passengers were safely evacuated, with no one trapped. Investigations into the cause of the major accident are underway.

title: ‘Bush, Obama said no’: Trump agreed to Netanyahu's war plan after rejections by 3 US Presidents
content: John Kerry revealed that Benjamin Netanyahu pitched an Iran war to four US Presidents, with only Donald Trump agreeing. Kerry, citing Vietnam and Iraq, warned against misleading the public on military action. A New York Times report detailed Netanyahu's "hard sell" to Trump for a joint US-Israeli mission, which Trump reportedly approved.

title: How long will it take for US to clear Strait of Hormuz mines positioned by Iran?
content: Iran's alleged mining of the Strait of Hormuz could delay its reopening for up to six months, according to Pentagon reports to Congress. This sophisticated deployment, using GPS technology, is making detection difficult for US forces. The standoff has already impacted global oil prices, with Brent crude exceeding $100 per barrel.  US officials vow to counter this threat.

title: MK Stalin, Vijay, EPS Face High-Stakes Battles In Key Tamil Nadu Seats
content: With the debut of actor-turned-politician Vijay's Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), the state is set to witness a high-stakes triangular battle.

title: "I Ate Jhalmuri, But Trinamool Felt The Sting": PM Modi In Bengal
content: Jhalmuri, a popular street food in Bengal, hit the headlines when PM Modi, during a poll campaign in Jhargram last week, stopped to enjoy the snack.

title: PM Modi's "10 Guarantees" For Bengal Women Ahead Of 2nd Phase Of Voting
content: PM Modi pledged that the BJP, after coming to power, will provide Rs 50,000 assistance for girls' graduation.

title: Trump Envoy Seeks To Replace Iran With Italy At World Cup Amid War: Report
content: Iran's participation in the World Cup has been thrown into doubt by the war with the US and Israel that broke out on February 28.

title: Voter Intimidation Charge, Trinamool vs Humayun Kabir As Bengal Votes
content: Allegations of voter intimidation have surfaced from Murshidabad and Trinamool workers clashed with Humayun Kabir in the same district as West Bengal votes in phase 1.

title: Who Is Aadhav Arjuna, TVK Leader In Spotlight After Remarks On Rajinikanth
content: The controversy began after he claimed that leaders from DMK had threatened Rajinikanth and prevented him from entering politics.

title: Video: Iran Shows Off Its Ballistic Missile At Tehran Rally Amid US Ceasefire
content: The pro-government display followed Trump's decision to indefinitely extend the current ceasefire between the US and Iran.

title: US-Iran War Live Updates: Tehran Claims It Received First Revenue From Hormuz Tolls
content: US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: The standoff between the US and Iran has effectively choked off nearly all exports through the strait -- where 20 per cent of the world's traded oil passes in peacetime -- with no end in sight.

title: Iran Still Has Half Its Missiles, 60% Naval Forces: US Officials
content: US officials said that around 60 per cent of Iran’s Revolutionary Guard naval forces are still active, including fast, small attack boats called the mosquito fleet.

title: UP Property Dealer, Under Debt, Poisons Pet Labrador, Then Dies By Suicide
content: Officials said that Nikhil mixed a sulphas tablet in buttermilk and first gave it to his dog and then consumed it himself.

title: West Bengal Elections 1st Phase Voting LIVE Updates | BJP MLA Agnimitra Paul's Car Attacked
content: West Bengal Assembly Elections 2026 Phase 1 Voting LIVE Updates: Around 3.6 crore voters in 152 of the state's 294 constituencies are expected to vote today.

title: Delhi Chief Minister Conducts Surprise Inspection At Aruna Asaf Ali Hospital
content: She also interacted with the doctors and hospital staff and directed the modernisation of health services, making it faster and citizen-centric.

title: Trinamool-BJP Battle Royale In Bengal With 152 Seats In Phase 1
content: Two states that have eluded the BJP for long are voting today and more than Tamil Nadu, it is Bengal that all eyes will be on. For Trinamool Congress and the BJP, it is a desperate battle amid the political firestorm over voter list revision.

title: Want To Invest In Cryptocoins? SIPs Start At Just Rs 500 Per Month
content: Across platforms, SIP participation in cryptocoins has surged 60-80 per cent year-on-year. Monthly active SIP mandates are also rising steadily.

title: J&K Woman Cricketer, Brother Arrested In Sextortion Case By Mumbai Cops
content: Mumbai Police arrest female cricketer and associates for sextortion involving Rs 63.61 lakh extorted from businessman

title: 'Proceedings Used As Online Tool In Political Campaign': Trinamool In Court
content: A video clip of the exchange between Menaka Guruswamy and Solicitor General Tushar Mehta, representing the Enforcement Directorate, was posted on X by the BJP's Amit Malviya. The post suggested that Mamata Banerjee's lawyer had referred to her as "Queen."

title: US Official Put On Leave After Ex-Boyfriend Levels "Sugar Daddy" Allegations
content: Julia Varvaro joined DHS last year and had also been publicly supportive of Donald Trump during the 2024 election campaigning.

title: Respect All Views Except WhatsApp University: Supreme Court In Sabarimala Case
content: The Supreme Court was hearing petitions related to discrimination against women at religious places, including the Sabarimala Temple in Kerala.
